question_text: From the diagram shown below comparing plant tissues, which labelled region is the parenchyma?

answer_key.explanation: L1 is the thin-walled, loosely packed region typical of parenchyma.
common_mistakes: Confusing parenchyma with collenchyma at corners.

visual.caption: Plant tissue regions labelled for identification.
visual.altText: A stem cross-section drawing with four labelled regions showing different cell wall thicknesses and arrangements.

spec.title: Plant tissue panel
notes: Each label marks a different tissue region in the panel.
